financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well financially because it makes a lot of money and invests in future projects.
Even though profits are down, the company is not heavily in debt and can easily pay its interest costs.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Moderate Risk
bullets: The company faces moderate risks because it struggles with following some rules and regulations.
Efforts to reduce pollution and improve cybersecurity show they are trying to manage risks, but challenges remain.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in taking care of the environment, which boosts its overall score.
It also manages social and governance aspects effectively, contributing to a strong performance.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company has a strong financial foundation with low debt, meaning it doesn't owe much money compared to what it owns.
It has a good track record of paying dividends, which shows it can reward investors while still saving for future growth.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company clearly explains how it is doing and where it is headed, showing they know their business well.
They have managed to produce a lot of coal and grow steadily, even with some challenges along the way.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company has a clear plan to grow by focusing on renewable energy and important minerals.
They have set specific goals and timelines, showing they are serious about making their plans happen.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: Coal India is financially strong and has plenty of resources, but struggles with high costs and land issues.
The company is stable for now, but investors should watch how it handles competition and financial risks.
